name: Input Capture Using Mouse Lock
notes:
This rule detects input capture using mouse lock tool.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Cian Heasley
SIGMA Title: Mouse Lock Credential Gathering
SIGMA Description: In Kaspersky's 2020 Incident Response Analyst Report they listed legitimate tool "Mouse Lock" as being used for both credential access and collection in security incidents.


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%mouse lock%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Input Capture Using Mouse Lock on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%mouse lock%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Input Capture Using Mouse Lock
Event description: Detects input capture using mouse lock tool.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
